command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- How many AB IDs from the CSV are already in DB?
SELECT COUNT(*) as already_in_db
FROM services 
WHERE connectionId IN (
  'AB056202','AB056206','AB056135','AB056114','AB055817','AB055812','AB055698','AB055689',
  'AB055641','AB055639','AB028007','AB029297','AB029331','AB029598','AB029816','AB029824',
  'AB029918','AB029919','AB029922','AB030076','AB030128','AB030140','AB030398','AB030566','AB030843'
);
